candidate_problem_record.subject: Physics
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: The graph below shows the variation of the strong nuclear force with nucleon separation. Which of the points $A$, $B$, $C$ or $D$ shows the repulsive nature of the strong nuclear force?
